verse_text: The Lord answered me, 'Because they forsook My law which I set before their face, and they did not hear My voice.

links.context: Reminiscent of the first Egyptian plague, this judgment affects fresh waters. Wormwood, an extremely bitter plant that would make water undrinkable, symbolizes the bitter fruits of idolatry and sorrow to those who pursue adulterous liaisons with the heathen Gentiles (see [[JER.9:12]]-16; 23:15).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
